atoms.subject: ts-cancel-service.CancelServiceImpl.getAuthorizationHeadersFrom
atoms.object: downstream request headers carry only the forwarded Authorization header

atoms.subject: ts-cancel-service.CancelServiceImpl.calculateRefund
atoms.object: refund is 0.00 when not paid, 0 after departure time, else 80 percent of order price formatted to two decimals

atoms.subject: ts-cancel-service.CancelController
atoms.object: cancelTicket maps a thrown exception to HTTP 200 with Response(status=1, msg=error, data=null)

atoms.subject: ts-cancel-service.CancelServiceImpl
atoms.object: ts-order-other-service PUT /api/v1/orderOtherService/orderOther with order status set to CANCEL

atoms.subject: ts-cancel-service.CancelServiceImpl
atoms.object: ts-order-service PUT /api/v1/orderservice/order with order status set to CANCEL

atoms.subject: ts-inside-payment-service.SecurityConfig
atoms.object: JWT bearer token via JWTFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter

atoms.subject: ts-inside-payment-service.Money
atoms.object: JPA table inside_money (id uuid, userId, money, type MoneyType stored as string)

atoms.subject: ts-inside-payment-service.Payment
atoms.object: JPA table inside_payment (id uuid, orderId, userId, price, type PaymentType stored as string)

atoms.subject: ts-inside-payment-service.ExecutorConfig.myAsync
atoms.object: caller-runs rejection policy when thread pool is saturated

contexts.label: inside-payment pay flow (order lookup, status gate, inside/outside branch, order status update)
inside-payment persisted money and payment ledger (shared state region)
ts-order-service order lifecycle (API surface, authority, status transitions, queries, persistence, seed)
ts-order-other-service order lifecycle (API surface, authority, status transitions, persistence)
ts-payment-service outside payment provider surface (pay, add-money, query, authority, persistence, seed)
notification delivery flow (HTTP notify surface, email queue, mail dispatch, notify record persistence)
shared order lookup boundary: cancel and inside-payment lookups converging on order / order-other GET endpoints
order status update boundary: cancel and inside-payment status writes converging on order / order-other update endpoints
drawback boundary between cancel-service and inside-payment-service
outside payment provider boundary between inside-payment-service and ts-payment-service
order-cancel notification trigger boundary between cancel-service and notification-service

covers.label: cancel/refund flow measurement surface: cancel command and refund quote flows, inside-payment pay/drawback, order lifecycles, payment provider, notification delivery, and their shared boundaries
